title: Better Saved Hotbars Forked
description: This mod allows you to drag items into the saved hotbars tab and remove them by middle clicking!
body:
# Better Saved Hotbars Forked

This is a fork of the original [Better Saved Hotbars](https://github.com/LukynkaCZE/better-saved-hotbars/) to port it over to newer versions.
This mod allows you to drag items into the saved hotbars tab in creative inventory instead of having to use keybind to save entire hotbar!

![ezgif-3-d3e9c47da5](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/48604271/235925525-e6b6a9f7-ef00-4148-ad51-6c8546ebcc55.gif)

You can also remove individual items by **middle-clicking** on them!

![ezgif-3-6f367dd9a5](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/48604271/235926011-ef33197d-0add-453b-8f3c-f5cff9907c88.gif)

# Contributing

If you found bug or something doesn't work, please open an issue [here](https://github.com/Azyrod/better-saved-hotbars/issues)

If you are developer and want to contribute, check out the [source code](https://github.com/Azyrod/better-saved-hotbars/). Feel free to open pull requests!

# Attribution

Original mod Author : [LukynkaCZE](https://github.com/LukynkaCZE)
